entities.name: Sixth City Marketing
entities.description: Sixth City Marketing is a full-service, ROI-focused digital marketing agency founded in 2010 and headquartered in Westlake, Ohio. It delivers SEO, PPC, web design and development, conversion rate optimization, and social media services in-house, with additional offices in Cleveland, Columbus, Pittsburgh, Indianapolis, Chicago, and Nashville.

hasChunks.text: We're a full-service SEO agency that prides itself on providing our clients with real results.
hasChunks.pageTitle: About Sixth City Marketing: Results-Driven Marketing Agency

hasChunks.text: We craft data-driven strategies based on your data (traffic, conversions, bounces, etc.) and are always willing to take a step back, analyze, and pivot our strategy if we need to.
hasChunks.pageTitle: About Sixth City Marketing: Results-Driven Marketing Agency

hasChunks.text: We have offices in Cleveland, Columbus, Indianapolis, Chicago, Nashville, and Pittsburgh with an in-house team of experts readily available to answer any of your questions.
hasChunks.pageTitle: About Sixth City Marketing: Results-Driven Marketing Agency

entities.name: Search Engine Optimization Services
entities.description: Sixth City Marketing's SEO service helps businesses earn higher Google rankings and more qualified organic leads through keyword research, technical SEO, content, and link building.

hasChunks.text: Gain a better ranking on Google and get more qualified leads from your site with SEO Marketing
hasChunks.pageTitle: Data-Driven Digital Marketing Services: SEO, PPC, Web Design

entities.name: Pay-Per-Click Marketing and Management
entities.description: Sixth City Marketing's PPC service manages paid search and advertising campaigns to increase qualified lead flow while maximizing return on ad spend.

hasChunks.text: See your lead flow increase with PPC services
hasChunks.pageTitle: Data-Driven Digital Marketing Services: SEO, PPC, Web Design

entities.name: Website Design and Development Services
entities.description: Sixth City Marketing designs and develops custom websites built to convert visitors into customers, on platforms including WordPress and Shopify.

hasChunks.text: Get a custom site created just for your business that converts users to customers
hasChunks.pageTitle: Data-Driven Digital Marketing Services: SEO, PPC, Web Design

entities.name: Conversion Rate Optimization Services
entities.description: Sixth City Marketing's CRO service revamps website pages and user experience with design-for-conversion to help clients reach their lead goals.

hasChunks.text: Let us revamp your site with design for conversion to reach your lead goal
hasChunks.pageTitle: Data-Driven Digital Marketing Services: SEO, PPC, Web Design

entities.name: Paid Social Media Marketing Services
entities.description: Sixth City Marketing extends paid advertising reach onto social platforms including Facebook and LinkedIn.

hasChunks.text: Expand your PPC reach on Facebook, LinkedIn, and more
hasChunks.pageTitle: Data-Driven Digital Marketing Services: SEO, PPC, Web Design

entities.name: Social Media Marketing
entities.description: Sixth City Marketing uses organic social media to build brand awareness and reach new audiences.

hasChunks.text: Taking advantage of social media to leverage your brand to new audiences
hasChunks.pageTitle: Data-Driven Digital Marketing Services: SEO, PPC, Web Design

entities.name: Consulting and SEO Auditing
entities.description: Sixth City Marketing offers marketing consulting and SEO auditing, providing expert advice to strengthen a brand's digital presence.

hasChunks.text: Allow our expert team to offer expert marketing advice that boosts your brand
hasChunks.pageTitle: Data-Driven Digital Marketing Services: SEO, PPC, Web Design

entities.name: Return on Investment
entities.description: Return on investment is the primary benchmark Sixth City Marketing uses to evaluate the success of its marketing campaigns.

hasChunks.text: ROI isn't just a buzzword for us; it's a benchmark.
hasChunks.pageTitle: An SEO Agency Focused on ROI | Data-Driven Digital Marketing

entities.name: Data-Driven Marketing
entities.description: The approach at the core of Sixth City Marketing's positioning: building and continually adjusting marketing strategy based on a client's own performance data rather than fixed packages.

hasChunks.text: We craft data-driven strategies based on your data (traffic, conversions, bounces, etc.) and are always willing to take a step back, analyze, and pivot our strategy if we need to.
hasChunks.pageTitle: About Sixth City Marketing: Results-Driven Marketing Agency

entities.name: John Sammon
entities.description: John Sammon is the Founder and CEO of Sixth City Marketing, with a master's degree in Visual Communication and over twenty-two years of experience in web development and interactive strategy.

hasChunks.text: John Sammon holds a master's degree in Visual Communication, with a specialization in interactive multimedia, and has over twenty-two years of experience with web development and interactive strategy.
hasChunks.pageTitle: John Sammon | CEO of Sixth City Marketing

entities.name: Ashley Friess
entities.description: Ashley Friess is the General Manager of Sixth City Marketing, overseeing daily operations across departments and the firm's business operations.

hasChunks.text: I oversee the daily operations of individual departments and manage the business operations for the firm.
hasChunks.pageTitle: Ashley Friess | General Manager | Sixth City Marketing

entities.name: Andrea Ozello
entities.description: Andrea Ozello is the PPC Director at Sixth City Marketing, leading paid media campaigns for the firm's PPC clients.

hasChunks.text: My role is essentially to manage all of Sixth City Marketing's clients that are utilizing PPC channels. Each day, I'm challenged to maximize the advertising spend of our clients by getting them the most response (web leads, sales and phone calls) with the most effective use of their media spend.
hasChunks.pageTitle: Andrea Ozello | PPC Director | Sixth City Marketing

entities.name: Brian Gorman
entities.description: Brian Gorman is the SEO Director at Sixth City Marketing, leading SEO strategy and client work for the firm.

hasChunks.text: My role is to manage all of Sixth City Marketing's SEO clients, ensuring their website is helping them reach their goals (web leads, sales, phone calls, etc.) with the most effective use of SEO tactics and strategy.
hasChunks.pageTitle: Brian Gorman | SEO Director | Sixth City Marketing

entities.name: Sarah Blocksidge
entities.description: Sarah Blocksidge is the Marketing Director at Sixth City Marketing, leading the firm's internal SEO, PPC, social media, and email marketing.

hasChunks.text: My role here is manage our internal marketing department's SEO, PPC, social media, and email marketing efforts.
hasChunks.pageTitle: Meet Sarah Blocksidge

entities.name: Hannah Gore
entities.description: Hannah Gore (formerly Hannah Browsky) is an Account Director at Sixth City Marketing, working closely with clients and strategists to help them achieve their marketing goals.

hasChunks.text: My new role consists to work closely with our clients and strategists to help them achieve their marketing goals.
hasChunks.pageTitle: Hannah Gore | Account Director
